info.description: Backend API for CineMatch movie platform
info.title: CineMatch API

post.description: Sends password reset email with token link
Sends new verification OTP to logged-in user who hasn't verified their email
Authenticates user with email and password, creates session
Invalidates user session and clears refresh token cookie
Validates refresh token from HTTP-only cookie and issues new access token
Resends verification OTP for unverified users (signup flow)
Resends password reset link for users who didn't receive it
Resets user password using token from email link

get.description: Returns all active sessions for the authenticated user. Accepts either Bearer token or magic link.

parameters.description: Magic link for session management (alternative to Bearer token)
parameters.name: magic_link

delete.description: Deletes a session by ID. If magic_link is provided, performs magic link flow.

parameters.description: Magic link for session management (alternative to Bearer token)
parameters.name: magic_link

post.description: Creates a new user account and sends verification OTP via email
Verifies user email with OTP or token from email link
Generates and sends a data export via email

get.description: Returns paginated list of user's favorite movies

post.description: Adds movies to user's favorites

get.description: Returns all TMDB IDs that user has favorited
Searches within user's favorite movies

delete.description: Removes a movie from user's favorites

get.description: Returns all available movie genres
Returns genres selected by the current user

post.description: Adds a single genre to user's selected genres
post.summary: Add a genre to user's preferences

delete.description: Removes a single genre from user's selected genres
delete.summary: Remove a genre from user's preferences

get.description: Searches movies via TMDB, caches results
Fetches trending movies from TMDB, caches results
Gets detailed movie info with credits and watch providers by TMDB ID
Gets reviews for a movie with hybrid cursor pagination (DB + TMDB)
Gets movie videos (trailers, teasers, etc.) by TMDB ID

put.description: Temporarily disables user account for specified duration

post.description: Starts the email change flow by sending OTP to old email
Resends OTP for email change flow

get.description: Returns the profile of the authenticated user

put.description: Updates name and/or profile picture for the authenticated user

delete.description: Removes the authenticated user's profile picture

put.description: Verifies old password and updates to new password

post.description: Verifies email change with OTP
Record user's reaction (like/dislike/hate/love/skip) to any movie and update reaction counts

get.description: Gets reviews for the authenticated user with cursor pagination

post.description: Creates a new review for a movie

patch.description: Updates an existing review (rating and/or comment)

get.description: Returns paginated list of streaming services from the master table

put.description: Replaces user's streaming services with the provided list

delete.description: Removes multiple streaming services from user's selected services
delete.summary: Remove multiple streaming services from user's profile

parameters.description: List of streaming service IDs to remove
parameters.name: request

get.description: Returns the streaming services selected by the authenticated user
Searches streaming services by name with pagination

delete.description: Removes a single streaming service from user's selected services
delete.summary: Remove a streaming service from user's profile

get.description: Returns 5 movie suggestions. User has 3 tries per week (resets every Sunday IST).
get.summary: Generate movie suggestions with weekly tries

get.description: Returns 1-2 movies with full details. Checks old logs first, then today's log.
Returns next movie with full details based on current tmdb_id
Returns paginated list of user's watched movies

post.description: Adds one or more movies to user's watched list

get.description: Returns all TMDB IDs that user has watched
Searches within user's watched list by title

delete.description: Removes a movie from user's watched list

get.description: Returns paginated list of user's watchlist movies

post.description: Adds one or more movies to user's watchlist

get.description: Returns all TMDB IDs that user has in watchlist
Searches within user's watchlist by title

delete.description: Removes a movie from user's watchlist

get.description: Returns 5 movie suggestions for the current week (Sunday to Saturday)

total_count.description: Vote counts from our DB (always present, 0 if movie not in DB)

user_reaction.description: User's reaction to this movie (empty if not reacted)

total_count.description: Vote counts from our DB (always present, 0 if movie not in DB)

user_reaction.description: User's reaction to this movie (empty if not reacted)

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by your access token (e.g., "Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...")
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
